notes: Cartographer Phase 0 target: deterministic LOGIC_ARITHMETIC + STATE_SYNC bugs, observable from the app's own rendered state (no payloads).

bugs.title: Plus increments the count by 2 instead of 1
bugs.description: Clicking Plus raises the count by 2 each click instead of 1.
bugs.expected_finding: Reports the Plus button increments the counter by 2 (wrong delta) instead of 1.

bugs.title: Reset sets the count to 1 instead of 0
bugs.description: Clicking Reset sets the count to 1 rather than clearing it to 0.
bugs.expected_finding: Reports Reset does not clear the counter to 0 (shows 1).

bugs.title: Notifications toggle label flips but aria-pressed never updates
bugs.description: Clicking the toggle flips its label Off/On but its aria-pressed state never changes — control and state disagree.
bugs.expected_finding: Reports the notifications toggle's visible state and backing aria-pressed/state disagree.
